world.description: Jerusalem's Latin Patriarch and the Custos of the Holy Land were prevented by Israeli police from entering the Church of the Holy Sepulchre on Palm Sunday. It was the "first time in centuries" the Heads of Church were prevented from attending.

science.title: Hidden Variables Fully Recreate Quantum Predictions In New Simulations
science.description: Previously considered incompatible, deterministic explanations for quantum entanglement are now demonstrated within the de Broglie, Bohm framework. This model rigorously reproduces all quantum-mechanical predictions, including the violation of Bell inequalities, using particle trajectories and spin dynamics. It clarifies how a deterministic universe could nonetheless yield the seemingly random outcomes of quantum experiments.

One month on, its conversations continue to shape Indias Viksit Bharat 2047 trajectory.

ai.title: iOS 27 Rumored to Feature All-New Siri App With 'Extensions' Feature
ai.description: In his Power On newsletter today, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman discussed Apple's upcoming AI plans in more detail. As he reported last week, this will apparently include a Siri app with a so-called "Extensions" feature across iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27. With the Siri app, the report said that iPhone, iPad, and Mac users would be able to interact with Apple's assistant in both text and voice modes.
